results.taskDescription: Fetch top 15 HN posts and write a paragraph-style summary categorizing them by topic. Tests substantive synthesis from observation data.
results.output:
# Today on Hacker News

The top stories on Hacker News today showcased a diverse mix of technological breakthroughs, environmental concerns, and personal achievements, reflecting the breadth of modern innovation. From the cutting edge of AI research to hands-on hardware projects, the community was deeply engaged with how technology is evolving and how we can build with it.

In the realm of **Artificial Intelligence and Computing**, the conversation was dominated by the rapid pace of AI development. Several posts addressed the state of AI capabilities, including the discussion titled "AI should elevate your thinking, not replace it," which garnered significant attention. The industry also debated evaluation methods, highlighted by the article noting that "SWE-bench Verified no longer measures frontier coding capabilities." On a more technical front, a "Show HN" post detailed "AI memory with biological decay (52% recall)," suggesting novel approaches to artificial memory models.

A strong focus was placed
